learnings.text: This build implements Jarrod Watts' AI orchestration principles - focus on anti-contamination (impossibility detection, contradiction detection) and quality gates (prompt lint, plateau detection)
sentence-transformers is already installed on this system - use it for semantic similarity in contradiction and plateau detection
SYSTEM_LEARNINGS.json already exists at N5/learnings/SYSTEM_LEARNINGS.json with 4 entries - migration must preserve these
When adding --format arguments to argparse subparsers, ensure main() passes args.format to format_output() calls. Build command currently ignores --format flag.

Contradiction detector: single-sided negation detection (one text has 'never/not/no' while similar text doesn't) catches contradictions that paired patterns miss - use similarity threshold of 0.7+ to avoid false positives
Test learning with contradiction: The API requires authentication

All four Watts Principles detection tools integrated into Pulse workflow: impossibility audit (pre-build), prompt lint (pre-build), contradiction detection (learning add), plateau detection (in-tick). Documentation created with full principles guide and quick reference.
All Pulse safety checks (impossibility audit, prompt lint, contradiction detection, plateau detection) must use try/except for graceful fallback - detectors may not be available in all environments
